description: Advance a level/difficulty counter on a score threshold or when a tracked tag is fully cleared, emitting a level-up event. Manages the counter, not scene loading.

levelKey.description: world.state key holding the current level (1-based).

scoreKey.description: Score key to read in scoreGte mode.

threshold.description: Score for the first level-up in scoreGte mode.

clearTag.description: Tag whose disappearance triggers a level-up.

maxLevel.description: Stop advancing past this level, 0 = endless.
